name: Loyalty: Create

description.en: Register your loyalty program on-chain. Uses your team slug as the unique identifier.
description.de: Registriere dein Treueprogramm on-chain. Nutzt deinen Team-Slug als eindeutigen Bezeichner.
description.fr: Enregistrez votre programme de fidelite on-chain. Le slug de votre equipe sert d identifiant unique.
description.es: Registra tu programa de fidelizacion on-chain. Usa el slug de tu equipo como identificador unico.
description.ro: Inregistreaza programul de loialitate on-chain. Foloseste slugul echipei tale drept identificator unic.

bot: Creates loyalty program on-chain using the team slug. Chains to configure automatically.

success.en: Loyalty program created! Now configure your program.
success.de: Treueprogramm erstellt! Konfiguriere jetzt dein Programm.
success.fr: Programme de fidelite cree ! Configurez maintenant votre programme.
success.es: Programa de fidelizacion creado. Ahora configura tu programa.
success.ro: Programul de loialitate a fost creat! Acum configureaza-l.
